tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Railroad Key Performance Metrics November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS. November 2024. new.mta.info. This performance metrics document was prepared for the November 2024 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Key performance metrics report prepared for the November 2024 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Cathy Rinaldi
tool_args.raw_text: Cathy Rinaldi President, Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Rob Free
tool_args.raw_text: Rob Free President, Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Metro-North October 2024 total ridership
tool_args.raw_text: October was a strong month for Metro-North ridership, with a total of 6.5 million riders, an increase of 13% from September and a 16.2% increase from October 2023.

tool_args.raw_text: Through October, farebox revenue was $25.1 million higher than the Forecast due to higher non-commutation ridership across all East of Hudson lines.

tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership for the month of October was 7.2 million customers - our highest monthly ridership since the pandemic

tool_args.raw_text: Our average weekday ridership for the month of October was 261,914 customers, the highest weekday average since the pandemic.

tool_args.label: LIRR highest monthly ridership to Grand Central Madison
tool_args.raw_text: And we had the highest total monthly ridership to Grand Central Madison with almost 1.72 million customers, based on load weight.

tool_args.label: LIRR September 2024 MDBF
tool_args.raw_text: The fleet MDBF... operated at 207,374 miles in September, exceeding the target of 150,000 miles.

tool_args.label: Harlem Line Station Rehabilitation and Accessibility Upgrades
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development awarded a design-build contract for station rehabilitation and accessibility upgrades at 3 stations on the Harlem Line – Williams Bridge, Woodlawn, and Botanical Garden.

payload.project_name: Harlem Line Station Rehabilitation and Accessibility Upgrades
payload.description: Station rehabilitation and accessibility upgrades at Williams Bridge, Woodlawn, and Botanical Garden stations on the Harlem Line. Includes ADA compliance upgrades, platform replacements, elevators, new canopies, real-time customer information displays, public address systems, security cameras, platform shelters, benches, lean bars, recycling centers, and new artwork.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Siemens SC-42 Charger Locomotive Acquisition
tool_args.raw_text: On Friday, November 1, Metro-North unveiled the first two of our new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives at Harmon Shop. These SC-42 Chargers are part of a 27-locomotive order that the Board approved in 2021, along with six locomotives being purchased by the Connecticut Department of Transportation, set to replace our aging fleet of 27 GE P32AC-DM Genesis locomotives.

payload.project_name: Metro-North Siemens SC-42 Charger Locomotive Acquisition
payload.description: 27-locomotive order of Siemens SC-42 Charger dual-mode locomotives approved by Board in 2021, plus 6 locomotives purchased by Connecticut Department of Transportation, replacing 27 GE P32AC-DM Genesis locomotives. Compliant with Tier 4 environmental specifications.

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

tool_args.label: LIRR Renewable Diesel Fuel Pilot
tool_args.raw_text: On November 4, the LIRR launched a pilot to test the use of renewable diesel fuel in one of our yard locomotives. This fuel presents an opportunity to reduce greenhouse emissions by up to 78% compared to traditional diesel.

payload.description: Pilot launched November 4, 2024 to test renewable diesel fuel in one LIRR yard locomotive. Aims to reduce greenhouse emissions by up to 78% compared to traditional diesel.

tool_args.label: LIRR Station Spruce-Up Program
tool_args.raw_text: This year we rolled out our Station Spruce-Up program and set an ambitious goal to complete spruce-ups at eleven stations within our system. Our in-house forces have completed ten of the eleven stations and we currently await delivery of a door that will allow us to complete the final one.

payload.description: Program to complete spruce-ups at eleven LIRR stations including repairs and improvements such as new paint, brighter and more energy-efficient lighting, bathroom facelifts, floor and wall tile replacements, signage, and platform improvements. In-house forces completed ten of the eleven stations.

tool_args.label: Long Island City Flood Wall Project
tool_args.raw_text: One such project is the new Long Island City flood wall. We're just about at substantial completion of this project, which included a perimeter flood wall with nine flood gates, three pumping stations, backup generators and relocated utilities.

payload.project_name: Long Island City Flood Wall Project
payload.description: Perimeter flood wall at Long Island City Yard and Station with nine flood gates, three pumping stations, backup generators and relocated utilities. Includes new car cleaning platform with electrified yard tracks. Substantial completion reached.
payload.location: Long Island City Yard and Station

location_normalized.raw_text: Long Island City Yard and Station

tool_args.label: LIRR State of Good Repair Bridge Overcoating
tool_args.raw_text: The LIRR and MTA Construction & Development completed critical state of good repair overcoating on three bridge structures in Nassau County, Montauk Branch's Valley Stream Station viaduct, Sunrise Highway Bridge on the Far Rockaway Branch, and the Merrick Road Bridge over the West Hempstead Branch.

payload.project_name: LIRR State of Good Repair Bridge Overcoating
payload.description: Critical state of good repair overcoating on three bridge structures in Nassau County: Valley Stream Station viaduct (Montauk Branch), Sunrise Highway Bridge (Far Rockaway Branch), and Merrick Road Bridge (West Hempstead Branch).

tool_args.label: Metro-North unveils first two Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives
tool_args.raw_text: On Friday, November 1, Metro-North unveiled the first two of our new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives at Harmon Shop.

payload.description: Metro-North unveiled the first two of the new Siemens SC-42 Charger locomotives at Harmon Shop.

tool_args.label: Veterans Day Wreath Hanging Ceremony at Grand Central Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: On Monday, November 11, we honored the nation's veterans... during our annual Veterans Day Wreath Hanging Ceremony at Grand Central Terminal.

payload.description: Annual Veterans Day Wreath Hanging Ceremony at Grand Central Terminal. Performance by MTA PD Pipes and Drums Band and MTAPD Officer James Volpe.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Holiday Fair Opening
tool_args.raw_text: After the Veterans Day ceremony, I officiated the opening of the Holiday Fair in Grand Central Terminal's Vanderbilt Hall alongside LIRR President Robert Free, Costa Rica Ambassador to the UN Maritza Chan, and representatives from the Costa Rica Tourism Board.

payload.description: Opening of the Grand Central Holiday Fair in Vanderbilt Hall featuring 36 local artisans and small businesses. Sponsored by Costa Rica Tourism Board.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: LIRR renewable diesel pilot launch
tool_args.raw_text: On November 4, the LIRR launched a pilot to test the use of renewable diesel fuel in one of our yard locomotives.

payload.description: LIRR launched a pilot to test renewable diesel fuel in one yard locomotive.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Holiday Lights Train begins operation
tool_args.raw_text: we'll begin operation of a specially decorated train on Friday, November 29, the day after Thanksgiving.

payload.description: Specially decorated holiday lights train begins operation on regularly scheduled trains on electrified segments of all three East of Hudson lines until the New Year.

tool_args.label: Beacon Station Parking Lot RFP Issued
tool_args.raw_text: The RFP, which was issued on November 1, 2024 requires responses by December 18, 2024.

payload.description: RFP issued for the northern section of the Beacon Station Parking Lot for transit-oriented development. Responses due December 18, 2024.

tool_args.label: LIRR Restroom Survey Program
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR has taken a significant step to improve customer service with the expansion of its Restroom Survey Program.

payload.description: Program allowing riders to provide real-time feedback on cleanliness and maintenance of station bathrooms via QR code surveys. Expanded to include bathrooms on rolling stock. Fully implemented by end of 2024.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Maintenance of Way
tool_args.raw_text: The Maintenance of Way (MOW) department leads this year-round effort, analyzing past winters and performing critical maintenance on snow-fighting equipment.

payload.description: Department responsible for winter preparedness, track, signal, and power-system inspections, snow-fighting equipment.

warnings: entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Maintenance of Equipment
tool_args.raw_text: the Maintenance of Equipment (MOE) team ensures that the railcars receive maintenance programs that allow the smooth operation of the trains during winter

warnings: entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Metro-North best October on-time performance ever
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North recorded the best October on-time performance ever, and it also achieved the highest year-to-date on-time performance in Metro-North's history.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North recorded the best October on-time performance ever, and it also achieved the highest year-to-date on-time performance in Metro-North's history.

tool_args.label: Metro-North weekday ridership at 79.2% of pre-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's average weekday ridership of 230,449 is a post-pandemic record, at 79.2% of pre-COVID levels in October 2019

payload.claim_text: Average weekday ridership was 79.2% of pre-COVID levels in October 2019.

tool_args.label: LIRR explosive ridership growth
tool_args.raw_text: We continue to see explosive ridership at the LIRR.

payload.claim_text: We continue to see explosive ridership at the LIRR.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison AM Peak trip share
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR customers continue to take advantage of the GCM service reaching 1,715,788 customers (based on load weigh data), which was the highest ridership recorded (stabilizing at 39% share for GCM AM Peak trips vs. 61% of AM Peak trips to Penn Station).

payload.claim_text: GCM service reached 1,715,788 customers, stabilizing at 39% share for GCM AM Peak trips vs. 61% of AM Peak trips to Penn Station.
